questionHtml: State the trend in relative brain mass in primates other than humans according to their time of divergence from humans.
markschemeHtml:
the longer ago they diverged from humans, the greater the relative brain mass ✔

Accept inverse.

Do not accept negative correlation.

meta.title: State the trend in relative brain mass in primates other than humans according to their time of divergence from humans.
